ns0:entry.ns0:title: DarkFlippers/unleashed-firmware
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DarkFlippers/unleashed-firmware
Language: c
Flipper Zero Unleashed Firmware

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
Language: c
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FRRouting/frr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FRRouting/frr
Language: c
The FRRouting Protocol Suite

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
Language: c
An open source, portable, easy to use, readable and flexible TLS library, and reference implementation of the PSA Cryptography API. Releases are on a varying cadence, typically around 3 - 6 months between releases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cactus-compute/cactus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cactus-compute/cactus
Language: c
Low-latency AI engine for mobile devices & wearables

ns0:entry.ns0:title: califio/publications
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/califio/publications
Language: c
Publications from Calif

ns0:entry.ns0:title: capstone-engine/capstone
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/capstone-engine/capstone
Language: c
Capstone disassembly/disassembler framework for ARM, ARM64 (ARMv8), Alpha, BPF, Ethereum VM, HPPA, LoongArch, M68K, M680X, Mips, MOS65XX, PPC, RISC-V(rv32G/rv64G), SH, Sparc, SystemZ, TMS320C64X, TriCore, Webassembly, XCore and X86.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebook/zstd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/zstd
Language: c
Zstandard - Fast real-time compression algorithm

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git/git
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git/git
Language: c
Git Source Code Mirror - This is a publish-only repository but pull requests can be turned into patches to the mailing list via GitGitGadget (https://gitgitgadget.github.io/). Please follow Documentation/SubmittingPatches procedure for any of your improvements.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hathach/tinyusb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hathach/tinyusb
Language: c
An open source cross-platform USB stack for embedded system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: libuv/libuv
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/libuv/libuv
Language: c
Cross-platform asynchronous I/O

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lvgl/lvgl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lvgl/lvgl
Language: c
Embedded graphics library to create beautiful UIs for any MCU, MPU and display type.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lz4/lz4
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lz4/lz4
Language: c
Extremely Fast Compression algorithm

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nginx/nginx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nginx/nginx
Language: c
The official NGINX Open Source repository.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openssl/openssl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openssl/openssl
Language: c
General purpose TLS and crypto library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: redis/redis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/redis/redis
Language: c
For developers, who are building real-time data-driven applications, Redis is the preferred, fastest, and most feature-rich cache, data structure server, and document and vector query engine.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tianocore/edk2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tianocore/edk2
Language: c
EDK II

ns0:entry.ns0:title: valkey-io/valkey
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey
Language: c
A flexible distributed key-value database that is optimized for caching and other realtime workloads.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wolfSSL/wolfssl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wolfSSL/wolfssl
Language: c
The wolfSSL library is a small, fast, portable implementation of TLS/SSL for embedded devices to the cloud. wolfSSL supports up to TLS 1.3 and DTLS 1.3! Update to wolfSSL 5.9.1 for the latest CVE fixes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zanfranceschi/rinha-de-backend-2026
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zanfranceschi/rinha-de-backend-2026
Language: c
Rinha de Backend - Quarta Edição: Detecção de Fraude com Busca Vetorial
